commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is indicated; this member-authored session-state PR needs maintainer review, green checks, and a conscious decision to land the bounded partial fix.; Cleared: The diff only changes local transcript parsing, in-memory chat.history filtering, and tests; it adds no dependency, workflow, secret, network, or code-execution surface. commands.review_summary:
The PR forwards JSONL record timestamps into chat-history metadata and filters stale pre-session-start `subagent_announce` user/assistant pairs from `chat.history` hydration, with focused gateway/session tests.

PR surface: Source +102, Tests +226. Total +328 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The issue has a high-confidence source and proof path: a JSONL transcript containing a stale `subagent_announce` user/assistant pair is read through the production reader and filtered against the new session’s `sessionStartedAt`; I did not rerun it locally in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is indicated; this member-authored session-state PR needs maintainer review, green checks, and a conscious decision to land the bounded partial fix.
